arts.ttl: Man United set for summer cash windful as Bayern Munich and Real Madrid circle defender
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have joined Real Madrid in the race to sign Manchester United defender Diogo Dalot, according to reports. Outlet TeamTalk have revealed that the 25-year-old has caught the eye of Bayern boss Vincent Kompany thanks to his remarkable consistency and adaptability – while he is also admired by those at Rea Madrid. The wingback’s […] The post Man United set for summer cash windful as Bayern Munich and Real Madrid circle defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Liverpool-PSG, Leverkusen-Bayern
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Tuesday's Champions League action as Liverpool take on Paris Saint-Germain, Leverkusen take on Bayern and Inter take on Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Report: Leipzig pip Bayern to 16-year-old Swedish talent
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have captured yet another talented teenager ahead of other clubs competing young Swede.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany counting on young players to shape club’s future
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies, Aleksandar Pavlović, Jamal Musiala, Jonas Urbig, Hiroki Itō, Tom Bischof (arriving in the summer from Hoffenheim), and Josip Stanišić could be key players for Bayern Munich moving forward. Knowing this, Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany wants to see each continue to develop and wants to help push the players to maximize their respective talent.

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong ruins Liverpool transfer plans as ex Celtic star plays Real Madrid cat and mouse
arts.sum: The Bayer Leverkusen winger was criticised by his teammates after the Champions League defeat to Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany proud of resilient Leon Goretzka
arts.sum: Surely, it could not have been a great feeling for Leon Goretzka last summer, when Bayern Munich board member for sport indicated that the 30-year-old should start looking for a new club. Speaking of coach Vincent Kompany, the manager is pleased with the way that Goretzka has handled the adversity.

arts.sum: After the 3-0 defeat last week at the hands of Bayern Munich, Bayer Leverkusen will need something close to a miracle to turn their fortunes around. Both teams made vast…

arts.ttl: Nagelsmann issues warning to Pavlovic: "If his rhythm remains as it is now..."
arts.sum: Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann would like to see Aleksandar Pavlovic play more for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — March 11th: What’s your prediction for Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Given the injury to Florian Wirtz and the outstanding 3-0 difference on aggregate, Bayern Munich ’s Champions League match vs. I’ve got Bayern Munich as a 2-1 winner over Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Right-back or central midfielder? Nagelsmann discusses Kimmich's role for Germany
arts.sum: A natural central midfielder, Joshua Kimmich has mostly been playing at right-back for Germany since Julian Nagelsmann took over. Will that continue?
